required_protocol_sentence: DKRs are discovery-worker scopes; PKRs are progression-worker execution units; there is no CKR worker.
assignment: Independently inspect hashes, predeclaration chronology, two exact-head archives, scripts, row ownership, all 54 raw observations, arithmetic, and frozen acceptance bands. Replay the checkpoint and verify throughput A/A passed all three rows while allocation A/A passed only SDK session.run and correctly rejected scope.run and managed ctx.exec for zero real signal and unstable roughly-two ratios. Confirm no rerun, no discarded observation, and all cleanup walls zero. Accept or reject the protocol result as reducing discovery only; do not accept a measurement protocol, performance target, or optimization claim. Do not edit product, subject evidence, or .okra.
stop_rule: Replay and audit once, preserve the rejection, and stop.
output_schema: Claim-by-claim verdicts with commands, row values, chronology, wall reads, and the exact blocked/downstream discovery boundary.
